prompt: Photograph of a finished custom-length matte-black curtain rod install in a Derry NH living room — single straight 96-inch matte-black rod with simple end caps spanning a wide picture window, no decorative finials. Linen drapery panels in oatmeal hung from black rings. Crown molding visible above. Soft mid-morning light from outside the window casts a soft halo around the drapery. High-contrast, slightly desaturated photography, working-contractor documentary catalog feel — NOT HGTV bright, NOT luxury hotel-staged, NOT real-estate photographer brightness. The lighting in a Snap-On distributor's tool room. No people in frame, no readable text anywhere, no logos, no brand names visible.
